2008.issue: [S2008] Version 5.0.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3012.issue: [S3012] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is not defined. Consider adding it for automated releases.

5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>=3 words). Affected languages: de (1 key, example: lblClientId); es (1 key, example: lblClientId); fr (2 keys, examples: txtBmwCardataConfiguration, lblClientId); it (1 key, example: lblClientId); nl (1 key, example: lblClientId); pl (1 key, example: lblClientId); pt (1 key, example: lblClientId); ru (1 key, example: lblClientId); uk (1 key, example: lblClientId).
